title: oreobolus oxycarpus subsp. oxycarpus
intro: Oreobolus oxycarpus subsp. oxycarpus, also known as swamp pingao, is a species of sedge found in New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Oreobolus oxycarpus subsp. oxycarpus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using its extracts in various pharmaceutical applications.
